name: Race Oncology Limited
summary: Race Oncology Limited operates as a specialty pharmaceutical company in Australia. The company is developing Bisantrene, a small molecule cancer chemotherapy drug that is used for the treatment of acute myeloid leukaemia. It has a preclinical research program with the University of Newcastle to explore the use of Bisantrene to treat melanoma. The company was formerly known as Coronado Resources Limited and changed its name to Race Oncology Limited in July 2016. Race Oncology Limited was incorporated in 2011 and is based in Sydney, Australia.
